Register.summary: Register a new avatar with the OASIS system.

VerifyEmail.summary: Verify a newly created avatar by passing in the validation token sent in the verify email. This method is used by the link in the email.

Authenticate.summary: Authenticate and log in using avatar credentials.

RevokeToken.summary: Revoke a given JWT Token (for example, if a user logs out). Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

ForgotPassword.summary: This will send a password reset email allowing the user to reset their password. Call the avatar/validate-reset-token method passing in the reset token received in the email.

ValidateResetToken.summary: Call this method passing in the reset token received in the forgotten password email after first calling the avatar/forgot-password method.

ResetPassword.summary: Call this method passing in the reset token received in the forgotten password email after first calling the avatar/forgot-password method.

Create.summary: Allows a Wizard(Admin) to create new avatars including other wizards. Only works for logged in & authenticated Wizards (Admins) or your own avatar. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetTerms.summary: Get's the terms & services agreement for creating an avatar and joining the OASIS.

GetAvatarPortraitById.summary: Get's the avatar's portrait (2D Image) using their id. Pass in the provider you wish to use. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAvatarPortraitByUsername.summary: Get's the avatar's portrait (2D Image) using their username. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain JWT Token.

GetAvatarPortraitByEmail.summary: Get's the avatar's portrait (2D Image) using their email.

UploadAvatarPortrait.summary: Upload's the avatar's portrait (2D Image), which is displayed on the web portal or on web OApp's. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAvatarDetail.summary: Get's the avatar's details for a given id. Contains their address, DOB, Karma, XP, Level, Portrait (2D Image), 3DModel, HeartRateData, Chakras, Aurua, Gifts, Stats (HP, Mana, Energy & Staminia), GeneKeys, HumanDesign, Skills, Attributes (Strength, Speed, Dexterity, Toughness, Wisdom, Intelligence, Magic, Vitality & Endurance), SuperPowers, Spells, Achievements & Inventory. They can also access the full Omniverse from inside their avatar. More to come soon... ;-) Only works for logged in & authenticated Wizards (Admins) or your own avatar. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAvatarDetailByEmail.summary: Get's the avatar's details for a given email. Contains their address, DOB, Karma, XP, Level, Portrait (2D Image), 3DModel, HeartRateData, Chakras, Aurua, Gifts, Stats (HP, Mana, Energy & Staminia), GeneKeys, HumanDesign, Skills, Attributes (Strength, Speed, Dexterity, Toughness, Wisdom, Intelligence, Magic, Vitality & Endurance), SuperPowers, Spells, Achievements & Inventory. They can also access the full Omniverse from inside their avatar. More to come soon... ;-) Only works for logged in & authenticated Wizards (Admins) or your own avatar. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAvatarDetailByUsername.summary: Get's the avatar's details for a given username. Contains their address, DOB, Karma, XP, Level, Portrait (2D Image), 3DModel, HeartRateData, Chakras, Aurua, Gifts, Stats (HP, Mana, Energy & Staminia), GeneKeys, HumanDesign, Skills, Attributes (Strength, Speed, Dexterity, Toughness, Wisdom, Intelligence, Magic, Vitality & Endurance), SuperPowers, Spells, Achievements & Inventory. They can also access the full Omniverse from inside their avatar. More to come soon... ;-) Only works for logged in & authenticated Wizards (Admins). Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain JWT Token.

GetAllAvatarDetails.summary: Get's all the avatar details within The OASIS. Only works for logged in & authenticated Wizards (Admins). Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAll.summary: Get's all avatars within The OASIS. Only works for logged in & authenticated Wizards (Admins). Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAllAvatarNames.summary: Get's a list of all of the avatar names within The OASIS. Only works for logged in & authenticated users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetAllAvatarNamesGroupedByName.summary: Get's a list of all of the avatar names within The OASIS along with their respective id's. Only works for logged in & authenticated users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetById.summary: Get's the avatar for the given id. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetByUsername.summary: Get's the avatar for the given username. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetByEmail.summary: Get's the avatar for the given email. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

SearchAvatar.summary: Search avatars for the given search term. Coming soon...

AddKarmaToAvatar.summary: Add positive karma to the given avatar. karmaType = The type of positive karma, karmaSourceType = Where the karma was earnt (App, dApp, hApp, Website, Game, karamSourceTitle/karamSourceDesc = The name/desc of the app/website/game where the karma was earnt. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

RemoveKarmaFromAvatar.summary: Remove karma from the given avatar. karmaType = The type of negative karma, karmaSourceType = Where the karma was lost (App, dApp, hApp, Website, Game, karamSourceTitle/karamSourceDesc = The name/desc of the app/website/game where the karma was lost. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

Update.summary: Update the given avatar using their id. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

UpdateByEmail.summary: Update the given avatar using their email address. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

UpdateByUsername.summary: Update the given avatar using their username. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

UpdateAvatarDetail.summary: Update the given avatar detail with their avatar id. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

UpdateAvatarDetailByEmail.summary: Update the given avatar detail with their avatar email address. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

UpdateAvatarDetailByUsername.summary: Update the given avatar detail with their avatar username. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

Delete.summary: Delete the given avatar using their id. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

DeleteByUsername.summary: Delete the given avatar using their username. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

DeleteByEmail.summary: Delete the given avatar using their email. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetUmaJsonById.summary: Get's the 3D Model UMA JSON for a given avatar using their id. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetUmaJsonByUsername.summary: Get's the 3D Model UMA JSON for a given avatar using their username. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetUmaJsonByEmail.summary: Get's the 3D Model UMA JSON for a given avatar using their email. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetLoggedInAvatar.summary: Get's the logged in avatar. Only works for logged in users. Use Authenticate endpoint first to obtain a JWT Token.

GetLoggedInAvatarWithXp.summary: Gets the logged-in avatar with XP (AvatarDetail). Used by STAR API GET /api/avatar/current so clients can refresh XP after beam-in.

AddXp.summary: Add experience points to the logged-in avatar (e.g. from game actions like killing monsters). Only works for logged-in users. Amount 0 is allowed: returns current XP without changing it (used by clients to refresh XP cache after beam-in).

SetActiveQuest.summary: Sets the active quest and objective for the logged-in avatar (tracker state). Persisted on AvatarDetail so they are restored after beam-in.

LinkTelosAccountToAvatar.summary: Link's a given telosAccount to the given avatar.

LinkTelosAccountToAvatar2.summary: Link's a given telosAccount to the given avatar.

LinkEOSIOAccountToAvatar.summary: Link's a given eosioAccountName to the given avatar.

LinkHolochainAgentIDToAvatar.summary: Link's a given holochain AgentID to the given avatar.

GetAvatarSessions.summary: Get all active sessions for a specific avatar (OASIS SSO System)

LogoutAvatarSessions.summary: Logout avatar from specific sessions (OASIS SSO System)

LogoutAllAvatarSessions.summary: Logout avatar from all sessions (OASIS SSO System)

CreateAvatarSession.summary: Create a new session for an avatar (OASIS SSO System)

UpdateAvatarSession.summary: Update an existing session (OASIS SSO System)

GetAvatarSessionStats.summary: Get session statistics for an avatar (OASIS SSO System)

GetAvatarInventory.summary: Gets all inventory items owned by the authenticated avatar. This is the avatar's actual inventory (items they own), not items they created. Inventory is shared across all games, apps, websites, and services.

AddItemToAvatarInventory.summary: Adds an item to the avatar's inventory. Quantity (default 1): amount to add; if item with same name exists and Stack is true, this is added to existing Quantity. Stack (default true): if true and item exists by name, increment Quantity; if false and item exists, returns error "Item already exists". Accepts InventoryItem with Name, Description, optional Quantity, optional Stack, and optional MetaData.

RemoveItemFromAvatarInventory.summary: Decrements an item's quantity in the avatar's inventory. quantity must be 1 or greater. The item is removed only when its quantity reaches 0 after the decrement.

AvatarHasItem.summary: Checks if the avatar has a specific item in their inventory.

AvatarHasItemByName.summary: Checks if the avatar has a specific item by name in their inventory.

SearchAvatarInventory.summary: Searches the avatar's inventory by name or description.

GetAvatarInventoryItem.summary: Gets a specific item from the avatar's inventory by ID.

SendItemToAvatar.summary: Sends an item from the authenticated avatar's inventory to another avatar. Target is the recipient's username or avatar Id. Works for all items (STAR and local).

SendItemToClan.summary: Sends an item from the authenticated avatar's inventory to a clan. Target is the clan name (or username when clan resolution is not yet implemented). Works for all items (STAR and local).

CreateOrder.summary: Creates a new cross-chain bridge order (token swap). Executes atomic swap with automatic rollback on failure.

CheckOrderBalance.summary: Checks the balance and status of an existing bridge order.

GetExchangeRate.summary: Gets the current exchange rate between two tokens. Optimized for low-latency real-time rate lookups.

GetSupportedNetworks.summary: Gets supported networks for bridge operations.

CreatePrivateOrder.summary: Creates a private bridge order with viewing key audit and proof verification enabled.

RecordViewingKey.summary: Records a viewing key for auditability/compliance.

VerifyProof.summary: Verifies a submitted zero-knowledge proof payload.

StartNewChatSession.summary: Starts a new chat session. PREVIEW - COMING SOON...

SendMessage.summary: Send a message in a chat session

Create.summary: Create a new clan. The authenticated avatar becomes the owner and first member.</summary>

Update.summary: Update clan name/description. Caller should be owner (enforcement can be added).</summary>

List.summary: List all clans, optionally filtered by owner avatar Id.</summary>

Delete.summary: Delete a clan. Typically only the owner may delete (idempotent if not found).</summary>

AddAvatarToClan.summary: Add an avatar to a clan as a member.</summary>

RemoveAvatarFromClan.summary: Remove an avatar from a clan. Owner cannot be removed.</summary>

GetLeaderboard.summary: Get leaderboard for a specific competition type and season

GetMyRank.summary: Get current avatar's rank in a specific competition

GetAvatarRank.summary: Get avatar's rank by ID in a specific competition

GetAvailableLeagues.summary: Get available leagues for a competition type and season

GetMyStats.summary: Get competition statistics for the current avatar

LoadHolon.summary: Load's a holon data object for the given id. Set the loadChildren flag to true to load all the holon's child holon's. This defaults to true. If loadChildren is set to true, you can set the Recursive flag to true to load all the child's holon's recursively, or false to only load the first level of child holon's. This defaults to true. If loadChildren is set to true, you can set the maxChildDepth value to a custom int of how many levels down you wish to load, it defaults to 0, which means it will load to infinite depth. Set the continueOnError flag to true if you wish it to continue loading child holon's even if an error has occured, this defaults to true. Set the Version int to the version of the holon you wish to load (defaults to 0) which means the latest version. Pass in the provider you wish to use. Set the autoFailOverMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to work through the the providers in the auto-failover list until it succeeds. Set it to OFF if you do not or to 'DEFAULT' to default to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoReplicationMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to auto-replicate to the providers in the auto-replication list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoLoadBalanceMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to use the fastest provider in your area from the auto-loadbalance list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the waitForAutoReplicationResult flag to true if you wish for the API to wait for the auto-replication to complete before returning the results. Set the setglobally flag to false to use these settings only for this request or true for it to be used for all future requests. Set the showDetailedSettings flag to true to view detailed settings such as the list of providers in the auto-failover, auto-replication & auto-load balance lists.

LoadAllHolons.summary: Load's all holons for the given HolonType. Use 'All' to load all holons. Set the loadChildren flag to true to load all the holon's child holon's. This defaults to true. If loadChildren is set to true, you can set the Recursive flag to true to load all the child's holon's recursively, or false to only load the first level of child holon's. This defaults to true. If loadChildren is set to true, you can set the maxChildDepth value to a custom int of how many levels down you wish to load, it defaults to 0, which means it will load to infinite depth. Set the continueOnError flag to true if you wish it to continue loading child holon's even if an error has occured, this defaults to true. Set the Version int to the version of the holon you wish to load (defaults to 0) which means the latest version. Pass in the provider you wish to use. Set the autoFailOverMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to work through the the providers in the auto-failover list until it succeeds. Set it to OFF if you do not or to 'DEFAULT' to default to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoReplicationMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to auto-replicate to the providers in the auto-replication list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoLoadBalanceMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to use the fastest provider in your area from the auto-loadbalance list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the waitForAutoReplicationResult flag to true if you wish for the API to wait for the auto-replication to complete before returning the results. Set the setglobally flag to false to use these settings only for this request or true for it to be used for all future requests. Set the showDetailedSettings flag to true to view detailed settings such as the list of providers in the auto-failover, auto-replication & auto-load balance lists.

LoadHolonsForParent.summary: Load's all holons for the given parent and the given HolonType. Use 'All' to load all holons. Set the loadChildren flag to true to load all the holon's child holon's. This defaults to true. If loadChildren is set to true, you can set the Recursive flag to true to load all the child's holon's recursively, or false to only load the first level of child holon's. This defaults to true. If loadChildren is set to true, you can set the maxChildDepth value to a custom int of how many levels down you wish to load, it defaults to 0, which means it will load to infinite depth. Set the continueOnError flag to true if you wish it to continue loading child holon's even if an error has occured, this defaults to true. Set the Version int to the version of the holon you wish to load (defaults to 0) which means the latest version. Pass in the provider you wish to use. Set the autoFailOverMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to work through the the providers in the auto-failover list until it succeeds. Set it to OFF if you do not or to 'DEFAULT' to default to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoReplicationMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to auto-replicate to the providers in the auto-replication list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoLoadBalanceMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to use the fastest provider in your area from the auto-loadbalance list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the waitForAutoReplicationResult flag to true if you wish for the API to wait for the auto-replication to complete before returning the results. Set the setglobally flag to false to use these settings only for this request or true for it to be used for all future requests. Set the showDetailedSettings flag to true to view detailed settings such as the list of providers in the auto-failover, auto-replication & auto-load balance lists.

SaveHolon.summary: Save's a holon data object. Set the saveChildren flag to true to save all the holon's child holon's. This defaults to true. If saveChildren is set to true, you can set the Recursive flag to true to save all the child's holon's recursively, or false to only save the first level of child holon's. This defaults to true. If saveChildren is set to true, you can set the maxChildDepth value to a custom int of how many levels down you wish to save, it defaults to 0, which means it will save to infinite depth. Set the continueOnError flag to true if you wish it to continue saving child holon's even if an error has occured, this defaults to true. Pass in the provider you wish to use. Set the autoFailOverMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to work through the the providers in the auto-failover list until it succeeds. Set it to OFF if you do not or to 'DEFAULT' to default to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoReplicationMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to auto-replicate to the providers in the auto-replication list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoLoadBalanceMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to use the fastest provider in your area from the auto-loadbalance list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the waitForAutoReplicationResult flag to true if you wish for the API to wait for the auto-replication to complete before returning the results. Set the setglobally flag to false to use these settings only for this request or true for it to be used for all future requests. Set the showDetailedSettings flag to true to view detailed settings such as the list of providers in the auto-failover, auto-replication & auto-load balance lists.

SaveHolonOffChain.summary: Save's a holon data object (meta data) to the given off-chain provider and then links its hash to the on-chain provider. Set the showDetailedSettings flag to true to view detailed settings such as the list of providers in the auto-failover, auto-replication & auto-load balance lists.

DeleteHolon.summary: Delete a holon for the given id. Set SoftDelete to true if you wish this holon to be kept (can be un-deleted later) or to false to permanently delete (cannot be recovered). Pass in the provider you wish to use. Set the autoFailOverMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to work through the the providers in the auto-failover list until it succeeds. Set it to OFF if you do not or to 'DEFAULT' to default to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoReplicationMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to auto-replicate to the providers in the auto-replication list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the autoLoadBalanceMode to 'ON' if you wish this call to use the fastest provider in your area from the auto-loadbalance list. Set it to OFF if you do not or to UseGlobalDefaultInOASISDNA to 'DEFAULT' to the global OASISDNA setting. Set the waitForAutoReplicationResult flag to true if you wish for the API to wait for the auto-replication to complete before returning the results. Set the setglobally flag to false to use these settings only for this request or true for it to be used for all future requests. Set the showDetailedSettings flag to true to view detailed settings such as the list of providers in the auto-failover, auto-replication & auto-load balance lists.

SaveFile.summary: Saves a file and returns the id linked to the holon that it is stored in.

LoadFile.summary: Loads a file with the given id.

SaveData.summary: Saves custom data with a given key to the current logged in avatar.

LoadData.summary: Loads custom data with the given key from the current logged in avatar.

GetEOSIOAccountNamesForAvatar.summary: Get's the EOSIO account name for the given Avatar.

GetTelosAccountPrivateKeyForAvatar.summary: Get's the EOSIO private key for the given Avatar.

GetEOSIOAccountForAvatar.summary: Get's the EOSIO account for the given Avatar.

GetAvatarIdForEOSIOAccountName.summary: Get's the Avatar id for the the given EOS account name.

GetAvatarForEOSIOAccountName.summary: Get's the Avatar for the the given EOS account name.

GetBalanceForEOSIOAccount.summary: Get's the EOSIO balance for the given EOSIO account.

GetBalanceForAvatar.summary: Get's the EOSIO balance for the given avatar.

LinkEOSIOAccountToAvatar.summary: Link's a given eosioAccountName to the given avatar.

GetAllEggs.summary: Get's all eggs currently hidden in the OASIS

GetCurrentEggQuestLeaderBoard.summary: Get's the current egg quest leaderboard

GetMyEggs.summary: Get eggs for the current avatar

GetAllFilesStoredForCurrentLoggedInAvata.summary: Get all files stored for the currently logged in avatar.

UploadFile.summary: Upload a file for the current avatar.

GetMyGifts.summary: Get all gifts for the current avatar

SendGift.summary: Send a gift to another avatar

GetGiftHistory.summary: Get gift history for the current avatar

GetGiftStats.summary: Get gift statistics for the current avatar

Get.summary: Health check endpoint for Railway deployment

Health.summary: Health check endpoint for Railway deployment

GetHolochainAgentIdsForAvatar.summary: Get's the Holochain Agent ID(s) for the given Avatar.

GetHolochainAgentPrivateKeysForAvatar.summary: Get's the Holochain Agent's private key's for the given Avatar.

GetAvatarIdForHolochainAgentId.summary: Get's the Avatar id for the the given EOS account name.

GetAvatarForHolochainAgentId.summary: Get's the Avatar for the the given Holochain agent id.

GetHoloFuelBalanceForAgentId.summary: Get's the HoloFuel balance for the given agent.

GetHoloFuelBalanceForAvatar.summary: Get's the EOSIO balance for the given avatar.

LinkHolochainAgentIdToAvatar.summary: Link's a given holochain AgentId to the given avatar.

GetMetrics.summary: Gets performance metrics for all providers

GetProviderMetrics.summary: Gets performance metrics for a specific provider

GetConnectionCounts.summary: Gets active connection counts for all providers

GetBestProvider.summary: Gets the best provider based on current strategy

RecordRequest.summary: Records a request for performance tracking

UpdateGeographicInfo.summary: Updates geographic information for a provider

UpdateCostAnalysis.summary: Updates cost analysis for a provider

ResetProviderMetrics.summary: Resets metrics for a specific provider

RecordPerformanceData.summary: Records performance data for AI training

GetQuotaLimits.summary: Gets quota limits for current subscription

CheckQuotaStatus.summary: Checks quota status for a specific type

GetPositiveKarmaWeighting.summary: Get karma weighting for a given positive karma category.

GetNegativeKarmaWeighting.summary: Get karma weighting for a given negative karma category.

GetKarmaForAvatar.summary: Get's the karma for a given avatar.

GetKarmaAkashicRecordsForAvatar.summary: Get's the karma akashic records for a given avatar.

VoteForPositiveKarmaWeighting.summary: Allows people to vote what they feel should be the weighting for a given positive karma category.

VoteForNegativeKarmaWeighting.summary: Allows people to vote what they feel should be the weighting for a given negative karma category.

SetPositiveKarmaWeighting.summary: Set's the weighting for a given positive karma category.

SetNegativeKarmaWeighting.summary: Set's the weighting for a given negative karma category.

AddKarmaToAvatar.summary: Add positive karma to the given avatar. karmaType = The type of positive karma, karmaSourceType = Where the karma was earnt (App, dApp, hApp, Website, Game, karamSourceTitle/karamSourceDesc = The name/desc of the app/website/game where the karma was earnt. They must be logged in & authenticated for this method to work.

RemoveKarmaFromAvatar.summary: Remove karma from the given avatar. They must be logged in & authenticated for this method to work. karmaType = The type of negative karma, karmaSourceType = Where the karma was lost (App, dApp, hApp, Website, Game, karamSourceTitle/karamSourceDesc = The name/desc of the app/website/game where the karma was lost.

GetKarmaStats.summary: Gets karma statistics (totals, distributions, recent activity) for a given avatar.

GetKarmaHistory.summary: Gets karma history (paged) for a given avatar.

ClearCache.summary: Clear's the KeyManager's internal cache of keys.

Generate's a new unique private/public keypair & then links to the given avatar for the given provider type.

GetCurrentStorageProvider.summary: Get's the current active storage provider.

GetCurrentStorageProviderType.summary: Get's the current active storage provider type.

GetAllRegisteredProvidersForCategory.summary: Get all registered storage providers for a given category.

GetRegisteredProvider.summary: Get's the provider for the given providerType. (The provider must already be registered).

IsProviderRegistered.summary: Return true if the given provider has been registered, false if it has not.

GetProvidersThatAreAutoReplicating.summary: Get's the list of providers that are auto-replicating. See SetAutoReplicate methods below for more info.

GetProvidersThatHaveAutoFailOverEnabled.summary: Get's the list of providers that have auto-failover enabled. See SetAutoFailOver methods below for more info.

GetProvidersThatHaveAutoLoadBalanceEnabl.summary: Get's the list of providers that have auto-load balance enabled. See SetAutoLoadBalance methods below for more info.

UnRegisterProviderTypes.summary: Unregisters the list of providers passed in.

UnRegisterProviders.summary: Unregisters the list of providers passed in.

SetAndActivateCurrentStorageProvider.summary: Set and activate the current storage provider. If the setGlobally flag is false then this will only apply to the next request made before reverting back to the default provider. If this is set to true then it will permanently switch to the new provider for all future requests.

SetAutoReplicateForAllProviders.summary: Enable/disable auto-replication between providers. If this is set to true then the OASIS will automatically replicate all data including the user's avatar to all available providers.

SetAutoReplicateForListOfProviders.summary: Enable/disable auto-replication between providers. If this is set to true then the OASIS will automatically replicate all data including the user's avatar to the list of providers passed in. The OASIS will continue to replicate to the given providers until this method is called again passing in false along with a list of providers to disable auto-replication. NOTE: If a provider is in the list of providers to auto-replicate but is missing from the list when false is passed in, then it will continue to auto-replicate.

SetAutoFailOverForAllProviders.summary: Enable/disable auto-failover for all providers. If this is set to true then the OASIS will automatically switch to the next provider if the current one fails. If load balancing is switched on then it will automatically switch to the next fastest provider.

SetAutoFailOverForListOfProviders.summary: Enable/disable auto-failover for providers. If this is set to true then the OASIS will automatically switch to the next provider in the list of providers passed in if the current one fails. If load balancing is switched on then it will automatically switch to the next fastest provider. The OASIS will continue to auto-fail over to the next provider in the list until this method is called again passing in false along with a list of providers to disable auto-failover. NOTE: If a provider is in the list of providers to auto-failover but is missing from the list when false is passed in, then it will continue to auto-failover.

SetAutoLoadBalanceForAllProviders.summary: Enable/disable auto-load balance for all providers. If this is set to true then the OASIS will automatically switch to the fastest provider within the ONODE's neighbourhood. This effectively load balances the entire internet.

SetAutoLoadBalanceForListOfProviders.summary: Enable/disable auto-load balance for providers. If this is set to true then the OASIS will automatically switch to the fastest provider within the ONODE's neighbourhood. This effectively load balances the entire internet. The OASIS will continue to auto-load balance over providers in the list until this method is called again passing in false along with a list of providers to disable auto-loadbalance. NOTE: If a provider is in the list of providers to auto-loadbalance but is missing from the list when false is passed in, then it will continue to auto-loadbalance.
